selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "<AI generated answer> ",
"reasoning_summary": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a comprehensive understanding of the various types of fake content that exist, including bots, propaganda, and disinformation. One approach to addressing this issue is through the use of AI-powered content detection tools, which can help identify and flag potentially fake content in real-time. Additionally, social media platforms can implement fact-checking mechanisms to verify the accuracy of content before it is posted or shared. Furthermore, users can be educated on how to identify and report fake content, and the importance of critical thinking and media literacy when consuming information online.",
"tone": "informative",

}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a comprehensive understanding of the various types of fake content that exist, including bots, propaganda, and disinformation. One approach to addressing this issue is through the use of AI-powered content detection tools, which can help identify and flag potentially fake content in real-time. Additionally, social media platforms can implement fact-checking mechanisms to verify the accuracy of content before it is posted or shared. Furthermore, users can be educated on how to identify and report fake content, and the importance of critical thinking and media literacy when consuming information online.
